patterns.message: lib/supabase/server.ts holds the service-role Supabase factory. It must only be imported from Server Components, Route Handlers, or Server Actions. The 'server-only' import inside that file will already fail the build if a Client Component imports it; this lint rule is a second layer of defense. If you need anon-key access in a Client Component, import from '@/lib/supabase/browser' instead.

lib/supabase/auth.ts builds a per-request session client bound to next/headers cookies(). It must only be imported from Server Components, Route Handlers, Server Actions, or middleware. The 'server-only' import inside the file will fail the build if a Client Component imports it; this lint rule is a second layer of defense. If you need anon-key access in a Client Component, import from '@/lib/supabase/browser' instead.

lib/admin/* helpers transitively pull in the service-role Supabase client. They must only be imported from Server Components, Route Handlers, or Server Actions. The 'server-only' guard on lib/supabase/server.ts will fail the build if a Client Component imports it; this lint rule is a second layer of defense.
